blocker_categories.why: User lacks required account, permission, or identity mapping.
blocker_categories.recommended_action: Open access request and contact Developer Productivity with role, team, and start date.

blocker_categories.why: Local machine or runtime prerequisites are not correctly configured.
blocker_categories.recommended_action: Run setup checklist, verify tool versions, and collect logs before requesting help.
alternate_tasks: Pair with mentor on architecture walkthrough

blocker_categories.why: Onboarding instructions are incomplete, stale, or inconsistent.
blocker_categories.recommended_action: Confirm correct doc version and request clarification in onboarding channel.
alternate_tasks: Capture doc gaps for follow-up PR

blocker_categories.why: Progress depends on an external approval or team action.
blocker_categories.recommended_action: Follow up with owner and include deadline impact.

detection_hints: do not know who owns this
blocker_categories.why: The responsible person or team is unclear.
blocker_categories.recommended_action: Use contact directory and escalate to onboarding coordinator if owner is still unknown.
alternate_tasks: Document unanswered questions for mentor sync
